sys_script_include.name: Header

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_4d276992932dc31040fcb6597bba1043
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_680259_scm.Header</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>Header</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[const Header = Class.create();
Header.prototype = {
    initialize: function (options) {
        this.transactionId = options.transactionId || gs.generateGUID();
        this.logger = new Logger({
            transactionId: this.transactionId,
            source: this.type,
            includeTimeStamp: true,
            includeUserInfo: true,
            includeSessionId: true,
        });
    },

    setNavigatorHistory: function (newUrl) {
        if (!newUrl) {
            this.logger.error("setNavigatorHistory called with no newUrl");
            return;
        }

        const relativeUrl = this._getRelativeUrlWithParams(newUrl);

        const description = this._getDescriptionFromUrl(newUrl);
        const title = this._getTitleFromUrl(newUrl);
        const transformedTitle = this._transformTitle(title);

        global.HeaderGlobal.setNavigatorHistory({
            description: description,
            transformedTitle: transformedTitle,
            newUrl: relativeUrl,
        });
    },

    _getRelativeUrlWithParams: function (url) {
        if (!url) return null;

        const normalizedUrl = String(url).trim();
        const withoutDomain = normalizedUrl.replace(
            /^[a-zA-Z]+:\/\/[^/]+\/?/,
            "",
        );

        return withoutDomain.replace(/^\/+/, "");
    },

    _getDescriptionFromUrl: function (url) {
        const descriptionRegex = /[?&]scm_record_id=([^&#]*)/;
        const descriptionMatch = url.match(descriptionRegex);
        return descriptionMatch ? descriptionMatch[1] : null;
    },

    _getTitleFromUrl: function (url) {
        const titleRegex = /[?&]id=([^&#]*)/;
        const titleMatch = url.match(titleRegex);
        return titleMatch ? titleMatch[1] : null;
    },

    _transformTitle: function (title) {
        if (!title) return null;
        return title
            .split("_")
            .map((word) => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1))
            .join(" ");
    },

    type: "Header",
};
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-20 10:03:38</sys_created_on><sys_id>4d276992932dc31040fcb6597bba1043</sys_id><sys_mod_count>7</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Header</sys_name><sys_package display_value="SCM" source="x_680259_scm">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="SCM">9b70ffe7836a2650efda54b6feaad334</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_4d276992932dc31040fcb6597bba1043</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-20 12:10:20</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
